headlines.description: France forward Ousmane Dembélé scored a first-half hat trick, including one off a feed from Kylian Mbappé, to help his team beat Norway 4-1 at the World Cup on Friday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dembélé hat-trick helps France past much-changed Norway

headlines.description: Senegal racked up the goals on 10-man Iraq in a 5-0 victory Friday that boosted their hopes of reaching the World Cup knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Senegal thrash Iraq, on course for knockouts

headlines.description: Cape Verde drew Saudi Arabia 0-0 to finish second in Group H
headlines.shortLinkText: Cape Verde's dream run continues, will face Argentina in R32

headlines.description: Spain defeated Uruguay 1-0 after another goalkeeping mistake by Fernando Muslera to advance to the knockout stage of the World Cup and eliminate the South American powerhouse.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spain beat Uruguay to win World Cup group

headlines.description: Egypt advanced past the group stage at the World Cup for the first time while Iran will have to wait to find out its fate after a 1-1 draw.
headlines.shortLinkText: VAR denies Iran late winner as Egypt advance

headlines.description: Leandro Trossard scored a pair of goals and Belgium overcame a slow start at the World Cup to advance to the knockout round with a 5-1 victory over New Zealand on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Belgium through as group winners, with NZ out
